PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionRelationImpl(EXPRESSION_RELATION)
    PsiPuppetIfStatementImpl(IF_STATEMENT)
      PsiElement(IF)('if')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(ELSIF)('elsif')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(ELSE)('else')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
        PsiElement(})('}')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
    PsiErrorElement:'!=', '!~', '%', '*', '+', '-', '.', '/', <, <<, <=, '==', '=~', '>', '>=', '>>', '[', and, in or or expected, got 'elsif'
      PsiElement(ELSIF)('elsif')
  PsiPuppetExpressionParenImpl(EXPRESSION_PAREN)
    PsiElement(()('(')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
    PsiElement({)('{')
    PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
    PsiElement(})('}')
